list.title: Components/ColorItem
list.description: This component represents a single color of a palette. Not to be confused with the {@link Components/ColorPreview | ColorPreview} component.

list.title: Components/ColorPreview
list.description: This component is the preview of a color inside a palette, displayed in the {@link Components/PalettesListView | PalettesListView}. Not to be confused with {@link Components/ColorItem | ColorItem}.

list.title: Components/ColorRange
list.description: Wrapper component for a {@link Components/Slider | Slider} component preceded by a label.

list.title: Components/Colorpicker
list.description: Wrapper component for sliders, fields, buttons that are part of the Colorpicker main view.

list.title: Components/Editor
list.description: Wrapper component for {@link Components/PalettesListView | PalettesListView} and {@link Components/PaletteDetailView | PaletteDetailView} components.

list.title: Components/Field
list.description: This component is a wrapper for the input 'text' of a specific color, preceded by a label.

list.title: Components/Header
list.description: Wrapper for the header items of the {@link Components/Editor | Editor} component.

list.title: Components/Modifiers
list.description: Wrapper component for the 'modifiers' section of the application.

list.title: Components/Palette
list.description: Represents a single palette inside {@link Components/PalettesListView | PalettesListView}.

list.title: Components/PaletteDetailView
list.description: Wrapper for the currently selected palette's colors, which are individually represented by {@link Components/ColorItem | ColorItem}.

list.title: Components/PalettesListView
list.description: Wrapper component for the {@link Components/Palette | Palette} components. Represents all the user's stored palettes.

list.title: Components/Slider
list.description: Slider component, similar to HTML native's input 'range'.
